rationale: The cited paper studies how raw idea quality predicts innovation success, which is plausibly relevant to the citing paper’s customer ideation/innovativeness context. But the evidence here is only one DOI-matched reference (ref #32) with no in-text context, and the citing note focuses on network clustering and redundancy mechanisms rather than raw-idea-to-market effects. Given this sparse and indirect evidence, it is not safe to drop or clearly keep.
